commit.message:
Fixed mobile layout: header/drawer pinned, tiles breathe with drawer, no text wrap

- Game screen uses CSS grid (auto auto 1fr auto) so header stays fixed at top,
  drawer fixed at bottom, board fills remaining space
- grid-template-rows transition (0.5s) creates symmetric inhale/exhale as drawer
  opens/closes — tiles smoothly compress and expand
- display:contents on game-layout lets board and drawer participate directly in
  the screen grid
- Container query units (cqw) for card text sizing — font scales proportionally
  to card width, never wraps, ellipsis as fallback
- Removed max-height approach in favor of grid row animation for perfect symmetry

feat(ego-lint): add module-scope prototype mutation detection (R-LIFE-27) (#83)

## Summary

- Add R-LIFE-27 (`lifecycle/module-scope-prototype`) to detect
`.prototype.` assignments and `Object.assign(...prototype, ...)` at
module scope (brace depth 0)
- Uses brace-depth tracking (same approach as R-LIFE-26) to distinguish
module scope from function/class scope
- Skips prefs.js and `service/` directory; deduplicates by (file,
expression)
- Advisory severity (WARN) — some extensions do this intentionally

Closes #79

## Test plan

- [x] New fixture `prototype-mutation@test` with both module-scope and
enable()-scope mutations
- [x] 4 assertions: exit code 0, detects direct assignment, detects
Object.assign, exactly 2 warnings
- [x] Verified `proto-override-dedup@test` does NOT trigger (prototype
overrides inside class methods)
- [x] All 539 tests pass (0 failures)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

---------

commit.message:
fix(apex_core): 심층 리뷰 52건 전량 수정 — Clean 달성 (#1)

* fix(apex_core): 심층 리뷰 52건 전량 수정 — Critical 6 + Important 22 + Minor 14 + Test 10

Phase 5 완료 심층 코드 리뷰 (6개 병렬 에이전트) 결과 52건 이슈 수정.
3차 재리뷰에서 전 영역 Clean(0건) 달성.

Critical: TOCTOU(C-01), UAF 계약(C-02), static_assert(C-03),
MPSC 안전성 문서화(C-04), SmallBuffer(C-05), TCP_NODELAY(C-06)
Important: 의존성/가드/캐싱/문서정합성 등 22건
Minor: 문서/로깅/테스트 인프라 14건
Test: 격리/assertion/경계조건/재진입 10건

빌드 성공, 23/23 테스트 통과.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(ci): ASAN/TSAN CI 실패 수정 — suppressions + nodiscard 경고

- test_timing_wheel.cpp, test_core_engine.cpp: [[nodiscard]] 반환값에 (void) 캐스트
- tsan_suppressions.txt: Boost.Asio false positive 패턴 활성화
- lsan_suppressions.txt: spdlog 글로벌 레지스트리 leak 억제
- CMakePresets.json: asan/tsan test preset 추가 (환경변수 전달)
- ci.yml: ctest --preset 사용으로 환경변수 자동 적용

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(apex_core): aligned_alloc size를 alignment 배수로 보정 — ASAN 수정

aligned_alloc(64, size)에서 size < 64일 때 C11 표준 위반.
alloc_size = max(capacity_, 64)로 보정하여 ASAN 통과.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(ci): TSAN/LSAN suppressions 경로 수정 — ${sourceDir} 중복 제거

${sourceDir}이 apex_core/로 해석되므로 apex_core/ 접두사 제거.
기존: ${sourceDir}/apex_core/tsan_suppressions.txt (파일 없음)
수정: ${sourceDir}/tsan_suppressions.txt (올바른 경로)

commit.message:
fix: also check epoch staleness after inference before submitting

Inference takes time, so epoch can drift during execution. Now checks
both before inference (skip stale tasks) and after (skip stale proofs)
to avoid submitting proofs that will be rejected.

Replace Anthropic SDK with LiteLLM for multi-provider LLM support

Switch from direct anthropic SDK to LiteLLM to support multiple LLM
providers (Anthropic Claude, Google Gemini, OpenAI). All 4 API call
sites (reader, reviewer, router, indexer) now use litellm.completion().
Config.api_key changed to FISC_API_KEY env var, with LiteLLM auto-
resolving provider-specific keys (GEMINI_API_KEY, ANTHROPIC_API_KEY,
OPENAI_API_KEY). Also fix Indexer to skip dotfiles (.DS_Store) and
remove past_answers test fixtures.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: skip stale proof submission when epoch has drifted >1 (testnet#4)

Miner now fetches the current epoch from the validator before submitting
a proof. If the task's epoch has drifted more than ±1 from the current
epoch, the proof is skipped to avoid guaranteed rejection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Render getpos tip as NHW_TEXT popup matching C's display_nhwindow

- getpos.js: Replace single-line putstr_message with proper NHW_TEXT
  window (create_nhwindow + putstr + display_nhwindow + destroy_nhwindow)
  matching C's TIP_GETPOS multi-line text popup. Flush pending --More--
  before creating the window to prevent renderInputBlockedState from
  prematurely rendering the popup during the dismiss-key loop.

- headless.js: renderTextPopup now accepts opts.isTextWindow to
  differentiate NHW_TEXT from NHW_MENU popup rendering:
  - NHW_TEXT uses "(end)" marker (C's process_text_window behavior)
  - NHW_MENU uses " --More--" marker (C's process_menu_window behavior)
  - NHW_TEXT uses cols-maxcol-2 for offx (matches C empirically)
  - "(end)" marker renders at same offx as text lines (no -1 offset)

- windows.js: display_nhwindow --More-- flush uses dismiss-key loop
  (space/enter/ESC/^P only) matching C's xwaitforspace behavior.
  Pass window type to renderTextPopup for NHW_TEXT/NHW_MENU distinction.

Improves seed032 screen match from 212 to 213 (popup step now matches).
No regressions: seed031 stays at 1365/1365, 32/34 gameplay passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix: revert unstable strategy, fix DB connection

- Revierte unstable_newEmbeddedAuthStrategy (causaba 410 Gone porque
  Shopify rechaza token exchange si el app no está enrolado en el programa)
- Mejora db.server.ts: explicita DATABASE_URL en datasources y elimina
  el $connect() manual que causaba issues en serverless (Vercel)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

perf: multi-row dispatch for fused NVFP4 GEMV kernels

When K is small (n_mb <= 512), use 8 warps with 1 row/warp instead of
4 warps on 1 row. Reduces block count by 8x and improves per-thread
utilization for QKV fused, gate+up fused, residual, and SwiGLU+residual.

Qwen3-4B decode: 288 → 294 tok/s (+2%)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: use NuxtLink overlay for feed card navigation

Replace unreliable JS click/touch handlers with an invisible NuxtLink
overlay (z-5) that covers the card body. Native <a> tag is the only
guaranteed tap target on all mobile browsers. Action rail stays at z-20
above the overlay so Save/Skip/Share/Open buttons still work.
Main content div is pointer-events-none so taps fall through to overlay.
No nested <a> issue: NuxtLink and action rail are siblings, not nested.

commit.message:
fix: remove 5 bottlenecks blocking autopilot from placing bets

1. entry_timing: removed "wait" action — only "skip" (TROPPO_TARDI) or
   "enter_now". No more blocking on hours_to_close > 48h or edge < 6%.
2. entry_timing: removed harsh microstructure penalties (thin_book -6,
   stale_book -6, spread_expensive -8, edge_thin -8, low_confidence -8).
   Weather prediction markets naturally have thin books.
3. betting_signal: liquidity hard block $500 → $50. Paper trading needs
   no liquidity, real trading with $25 stakes needs very little.
4. paper_autopilot: accept timing "wait" — only skip on "skip". The
   autopilot runs every 30min, it will re-evaluate.
5. action_plan: removed "wait→watch_only" override. If signal says
   SCOMMETTI/CAUTELA, let the bet through regardless of timing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Inflation : montrer le vrai pouvoir d'achat futur (€ constants)

Problème : toutes les projections étaient en euros nominaux figés.
Sur 14-30 ans, ça donnait une fausse impression de richesse
(ex : 16k€/mois à 75 ans qui n'en valent que ~8k en € 2026).

Approche choisie :
- Le calcul reste 100% nominal (rendement 6%, intérêts composés inchangés)
- Nouveau paramètre `inflation` (défaut 2%, slider 0-5%)
- Les revenus qui suivent l'inflation (TJM, missions, retraite obligatoire)
  croissent en nominal via inflate() — leur pouvoir d'achat reste constant
- Les revenus du capital (passif, drawdown, rente PER) restent en nominal
  et sont déflatés via deflate() pour l'affichage en € constants
- Colonne "en € 2026" dans les tableaux (visible si inflation > 0)
- Courbe rouge pointillée "Revenu réel /mois" sur le graphique
- Support CLI (--inflation) et URL partageable

Hypothèses d'indexation :
- TJM freelance → suit l'inflation (le tarif est réévalué chaque année)
- Retraite obligatoire → indexée sur l'inflation (art. L161-25 CSS)
- Revenus du capital (4% SWR, rente PER) → nominaux, déflatés à l'affichage

Vérifié : phase 1 nominal monte (+2%/an), réel constant à 6 814€.
À 75 ans : 18 237€ nominal → 8 424€ réel.

refactor: security hardening, lockout UX, immutable kanban state, and agent run logging

- Add SET search_path to SECURITY DEFINER functions to prevent schema hijack
- Add Anthropic API to CSP connect-src allowlist
- Fix webhooks.sql: inline pg_net call in trigger to avoid NULL trigger context vars
- LoginForm: progressive exponential lockout with countdown; role-aware post-login redirect
- LogoutButton + DashboardClient: use useAuth().signOut() to clear context state on logout

- auth-service: normalize error messages to prevent info leakage; always return success on password reset to prevent email enumeration
- draft-outreach: extract logRun helper for agent_runs inserts (fire-and-forget, no added latency)
- Kanban Board: fix direct mutation of draft state; use immutable spread pattern

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix frontend deploy verify (#450) (#451)

* Fix backend container crash — create data_dir before SQLite init (#448)

The container crashes on startup because SQLite can't open the database
file at ~/.terrascry/datasets/terrascry.db — the parent directory doesn't
exist in the container filesystem. Ensure data_dir is created when
computing the default database URL.

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix frontend deploy verify — use az CLI health check instead of curl (#450)

The frontend is behind Cloudflare Access, so curl gets a 403. Use
az containerapp revision list to check the revision health state instead.

commit.message:
perf: fused SwiGLU+NVFP4 GEMV+residual kernel for decode

New gemv_nvfp4_swiglu_residual kernel computes SwiGLU activation
inline during the NVFP4 GEMV dot product, eliminating the separate
SwiGLU kernel launch and intermediate buffer write/read per layer.

Results (decode tok/s):
- Qwen3-4B: 273 → 288 (+5.5%)
- Qwen3-8B: 138 → 184 (+33%)
- GeGLU models (Gemma-3) use fallback path (separate activation)

  animation (opacity + scale) with staggered delays per star
- Added prefers-reduced-motion support for new animations

Docker compose interpolates variables from .env in the compose file
directory, not from env_file. Use env_file for both services instead.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add changepoint, fractal, individual differences, and HMM analysis modules

Extends the analysis pipeline with Bayesian online changepoint detection,
detrended fluctuation analysis, sample entropy, PCA + GMM clustering for
behavioral phenotypes, and Hidden Markov Models. Expands dynamical analysis
with EDM simplex, CCM, and S-Map. Updates README with full pipeline docs.

commit.message:
Add focused practice: Learn & Flashcard from My Word List

Users can now select words in My Word List and practice them via Learn
or Flashcard modes (not just Quiz). Navigation stays within the focused
session until explicitly exited. Shared links (#words/, #quiz/) also
activate focused mode.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Update credit system: 100 starting credits, pre-generation check

- Update migration 001 defaults from 500 to 100 (consistent with 003)
- Fix Settings.tsx credit limit default from 500 to 100
- Fix Settings credit balance color to use percentage-based thresholds
- Add credit check before AI generation (shows upgrade modal if < 50)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: remove Stripe trial_period_days to prevent dual trial (#371)

The app gives 14 days trial via trial_ends_at in the DB. Stripe
Checkout was also giving trial_period_days: 14, resulting in 28
days free instead of 14. Now only the app-level trial controls
the trial period.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix all issues from Rule of Five review (74 tests passing)

Critical:
- Thread-safe ID generation (Lock + uuid4, no more duplicate IDs)
- accuracy() no longer truncated by default limit of 100
- Bidirectional lineage in supersede() (children list updated)
- Self-supersede guard raises ValueError
- Input validation on Subject.type, Judgment.action, confidence, score, dimensions
- 74 tests across models, core, serialise, and store
- Apache 2.0 LICENSE file added
- Removed broken CLI entrypoint from pyproject.toml

Important:
- expire() respects per-verdict TTL and sets closed_at
- from_dict() validates required fields, schema version, null timestamps
- Descriptive datetime parsing errors with field names
- Exported MemoryStore, VerdictFilter, AccuracyFilter, serialisation functions
- Implemented by_lineage() for up/down/both traversal
- Fixed accuracy denominator (all rates use total_resolved)
- MemoryStore uses threading.Lock for basic thread safety

Minor:
- Descriptive variable names in from_dict()
- Fixed docstrings (serialise.py, core.py mutation docs)
- TTL_DEFAULT constant replaces magic number
- py.typed marker for type checker support
- .venv added to .gitignore

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
